findings.description: The top portion of the image shows a 7-item bullet list of AI society principles (人間中心の原則, 教育・リテラシーの原則, プライバシー確保の原則, セキュリティ確保の原則, 公正競争確保の原則, 公平性・説明責任及び透明性の原則, イノベーションの原則) followed by an explanatory paragraph. None of these 7 principles are captured as term or list entities in the release — only the callout figure refers to them obliquely.
The explanatory paragraph about 人間中心のAI社会原則 (clarifying 人間中心 vs AI中心 distinction) is not represented as a standalone entity; its key point is only partially captured in the figure caption.

reviewer_notes: R1.1 fix confirmed: figure::p153::1 caption jp starts with '試験にはコレが出る！人間中心のAI社会原則の設問では、「AI中心」ではなく「人間中心」であることが問われる' — the extended caption accurately captures the exam tip. The table and two term entities (トレーサビリティ, POSシステム) are accurate vs the image. However, the 7 AI principles listed at the top of the page are entirely absent from the release, constituting a medium-severity missing_visual finding that warrants WARN verdict.
